'''yotadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:bianisotropic|bianisotropic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bianisotropic|bianisotropic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yotadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotadithi|yotadithi]] || [[word:yotadiji|yotadiji]] || [[word:yotadishi|yotadishi]] || [[word:yotadiki|yotadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotaduthuthu|yotaduthuthu]] || [[word:yotadujuju|yotadujuju]] || [[word:yotadushushu|yotadushushu]] || [[word:yotadukuku|yotadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotaduthu|yotaduthu]] || [[word:yotaduju|yotaduju]] || [[word:yotadushu|yotadushu]] || [[word:yotaduku|yotaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotadufthuf|yotadufthuf]] || [[word:yotadufjuf|yotadufjuf]] || [[word:yotadufshuf|yotadufshuf]] || [[word:yotadufkuf|yotadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotadethe|yotadethe]] || [[word:yotadeje|yotadeje]] || [[word:yotadeshe|yotadeshe]] || [[word:yotadeke|yotadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotadothotho|yotadothotho]] || [[word:yotadojojo|yotadojojo]] || [[word:yotadoshosho|yotadoshosho]] || [[word:yotadokoko|yotadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotadotho|yotadotho]] || [[word:yotadojo|yotadojo]] || [[word:yotadosho|yotadosho]] || [[word:yotadoko|yotadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotadofthof|yotadofthof]] || [[word:yotadofjof|yotadofjof]] || [[word:yotadofshof|yotadofshof]] || [[word:yotadofkof|yotadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfthÃŸf|yotadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfjÃŸf|yotadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfshÃŸf|yotadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfkÃŸf|yotadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|yotadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|yotadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|yotadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|yotadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfthÃŸf|yotadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfjÃŸf|yotadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfshÃŸf|yotadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfkÃŸf|yotadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfthÃŸf|yotadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfjÃŸf|yotadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfshÃŸf|yotadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:yotadÃŸfkÃŸf|yotadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yotadÃḊthÃḊ|yotadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:yotadÃḊjÃḊ|yotadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:yotadÃḊshÃḊ|yotadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:yotadÃḊkÃḊ|yotadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yotadathatha|yotadathatha]] || [[word:yotadajaja|yotadajaja]] || [[word:yotadashasha|yotadashasha]] || [[word:yotadakaka|yotadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yotadatha|yotadatha]] || [[word:yotadaja|yotadaja]] || [[word:yotadasha|yotadasha]] || [[word:yotadaka|yotadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yotadafthaf|yotadafthaf]] || [[word:yotadafjaf|yotadafjaf]] || [[word:yotadafshaf|yotadafshaf]] || [[word:yotadafkaf|yotadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yotadasha|yotadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yotadshÃḋsha|yotadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yotadrosha|yotadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yotadmusha|yotadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yotadyasha|yotadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyotadnkshÃḋsha|goyotadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyotadnkrosha|goyotadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyotadnkmusha|goyotadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyotadnkyasha|goyotadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yotatadasha|yotatadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yotatadshÃḋsha|yotatadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yotatadrosha|yotatadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yotatadmusha|yotatadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yotatadyasha|yotatadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyotatadnkshÃḋsha|goyotatadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyotatadnkrosha|goyotatadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyotatadnkmusha|goyotatadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyotatadnkyasha|goyotatadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yetÃḊdasha|yetÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yetÃḊdshÃḋsha|yetÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yetÃḊdrosha|yetÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yetÃḊdmusha|yetÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yetÃḊdyasha|yetÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyetÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|goyetÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyetÃḊdnkrosha|goyetÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyetÃḊdnkmusha|goyetÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyetÃḊdnkyasha|goyetÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yotfadasha|yotfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yotfadshÃḋsha|yotfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yotfadrosha|yotfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yotfadmusha|yotfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yotfadyasha|yotfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyotfadnkshÃḋsha|goyotfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyotfadnkrosha|goyotfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyotfadnkmusha|goyotfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyotfadnkyasha|goyotfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
